Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6DC0 "CALVIN-6DC0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Calvin (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Because the game is frozen, you must set a breakpoint at $6DC0, start the game and lose all your lives. Once the breakpoint is hit, you can create the dump.
